form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 9 at Muswellbrook Mdn-Sw on April 6 over 900m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Bifurcation carrying 59kg at $6.50. Before that 4th of 11 at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Autumn King carrying 56kg at $13. Racing well but finding it hard to break through - each-way hope.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up got back early 4th in a small field at Gosford Super Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1000m, slow going 2 len behind Stubborn Emmelie carrying 57.5kg at $51. Second-up 6th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina with 54kg at $31. The step up in distance should help - great chance at big odds.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Second-up 6th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina with 54kg at $31. The step up in distance should help - great chance at big odds.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to lay out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by Harry Angel out of She's Never Late. At the most recent trial finished fifth here over 900m. Watch for any market moves.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after only one start. Back after 14 months break. At debut last start 5th of 7 at Quirindi 2yo Hcp on February 21 2025 over 1000m, 6 len behind Social Circle with 55.5kg at $10. Had three recent trials to get ready for this. Last trial fifth at Scone in a 900m trial on April 1. Should return a better horse this prep.
